hatsuneDisappearance.name: Hatsune Disappearance

selftest.title: Self Test
selftest.subtitle: MBTI, SBTI, and 8Values fun quizzes
selftest.forfeitConfirm: Are you sure you want to quit and abandon the current test?

mbti.title: MBTI
mbti.subtitle: Myers-Briggs Type Indicator
mbti.description: Explore your personality preferences through 12 quick questions.
mbti.q1: You feel recharged after spending time alone.
mbti.q2: You prefer deep one-on-one conversations to large parties.
mbti.q3: You usually think before you speak.
mbti.q4: You enjoy exploring abstract ideas and future possibilities.
mbti.q5: You trust intuition and patterns over concrete facts.
mbti.q6: You focus on the big picture rather than small details.
mbti.q7: You consider people's feelings when making decisions.
mbti.q8: You value harmony and compassion over strict logic.
mbti.q9: You often rely on empathy to judge a situation.
mbti.q10: You prefer to keep your options open rather than plan everything.
mbti.q11: You adapt easily to unexpected changes.
mbti.q12: You enjoy spontaneous decisions more than following a fixed schedule.

intj.title: Architect
intj.desc: You are independent, rational, and skilled at long-term planning. Complex systems look like puzzles to you, and you always find the most efficient solution.

intp.title: Logician
intp.desc: You are deeply curious and love exploring theories and principles. You enjoy dissecting problems and seeking truth more than executing plans.

entj.title: Commander
entj.desc: You are a natural leader with clear goals and decisive action. You excel at organizing resources and guiding teams to victory.

entp.title: Debater
entp.desc: You are witty, provocative, and love examining issues from every angle. Your creativity often surprises others.

infj.title: Advocate
infj.desc: You are quiet yet insightful, highly sensitive to others' emotions. You pursue meaning and quietly work toward your ideals.

infp.title: Mediator
infp.desc: You are gentle, idealistic, and value inner authenticity. You understand others easily and often find resonance in art and writing.

enfj.title: Protagonist
enfj.desc: You are warm, charismatic, and skilled at inspiring those around you. You care about others' growth and naturally bring teams together.

enfp.title: Campaigner
enfp.desc: You are energetic and passionate about freedom and possibility. You see the best in everyone and light up any social gathering.

istj.title: Logistician
istj.desc: You are practical, reliable, and attentive to rules and details. You work methodically and are a trustworthy cornerstone of any team.

isfj.title: Defender
isfj.desc: You are considerate and attentive, quietly caring for those around you. You value responsibility and tradition, showing care through action.

estj.title: Executive
estj.desc: You are decisive and efficient, skilled at managing people and tasks. You value order and keep teams running smoothly within clear rules.

esfj.title: Consul
esfj.desc: You are friendly and helpful, eager to create a harmonious atmosphere. You pay attention to others' needs and are the warm center of social events.

istp.title: Virtuoso
istp.desc: You are calm, practical, and enjoy hands-on problem solving. You love exploring how things work, and action speaks louder than words for you.

isfp.title: Adventurer
isfp.desc: You are sensitive, easygoing, and possess a unique aesthetic sense. You live in the moment and express your inner world through art.

estp.title: Entrepreneur
estp.desc: You are bold, quick-witted, and love taking on challenges. You seize opportunities and always find excitement and a way forward amid change.

esfp.title: Entertainer
esfp.desc: You are enthusiastic and outgoing, the life of the party. You enjoy the present and turn ordinary moments into lively performances.

sbti.title: SBTI
sbti.subtitle: Silly Big Personality Test
sbti.description: A lighthearted meme personality test. Don't take it too seriously.
sbti.q1: Every morning I wake up feeling like a breathing corpse.
sbti.q2: On weekends I'd rather lie around at home than go out.
sbti.q3: My friends say I always look low-battery, like a power-saving mode personified.
sbti.q4: In group chats, I'm usually the quickest to catch the joke and hype up the mood.
sbti.q5: I enjoy organizing events and feel accomplished when everyone gathers around me.
sbti.q6: I'd rather make my own decisions than follow someone else's lead.
sbti.q7: In meetings, I often can't resist jumping in with my opinions.
sbti.q8: When I see something I like, I buy it without hesitation.
sbti.q9: At gatherings, I always offer to pay first, and my wallet speaks before I do.
sbti.q10: My spending philosophy is that money is just accompanying me in another form.
sbti.q11: When friends ask to borrow money, I often find it hard to say no.
sbti.q12: I feel like my income can never catch up with my spending.

abr.title: Controller
abr.desc: You're the life-winner template: energetic, commanding, and financially loaded. While others hesitate, you've already got the situation firmly in hand.

abp.title: Boss
abp.desc: You naturally carry a leader's aura and look like you're inspecting your territory wherever you go. Your wallet may be tight sometimes, but your presence never is.

amr.title: ATM
amr.desc: You're low-key wealthy, the hidden financier of your friend group. You don't talk much, but your transfer history says it all.

amp.title: FAKE
amp.desc: You look harmless on the surface, but your inner drama is off the charts. You claim to be lying flat while secretly grinding—Oscar-worthy performance.

dbr.title: HHHH
dbr.desc: You're a Malo who looks dead on the outside but is secretly delighted inside. Rich but unmotivated, your biggest exercise is lying down and counting money.

dbp.title: POOR
dbp.desc: You're the classic worker: tired, broke, but still hanging in there. Life isn't easy, but your roasts about it are still top-tier.

dmr.title: IMSB
dmr.desc: You're quiet, but your account balance does the talking. The classic silent-but-loaded type: zero social battery, full financial battery.

dmp.title: DEAD
dmp.desc: You've seen through life and entered a state of 'alive but not really.' Poverty keeps you awake, and the dead vibe keeps you peaceful.

8values.title: 8Values
8values.subtitle: Political compass test
8values.description: Discover your leanings across economic, diplomatic, civil, and social axes through 16 questions.
8values.q1: The government should use high taxes to reduce wealth inequality.
8values.q2: Basic healthcare and education should be provided free by the government.
8values.q3: Free market competition matters more than wealth redistribution.
8values.q4: A market economy is the most effective way to create wealth.
8values.q5: National interests should take priority over international cooperation.
8values.q6: Protecting domestic industries and jobs is more important than globalization.
8values.q7: Borders between countries should be more open.
8values.q8: Global problems require countries to work together and negotiate.
8values.q9: Individual freedom matters more than social order.
8values.q10: The government should have the power to monitor citizens for security.
8values.q11: Citizens should be able to criticize the government without punishment.
8values.q12: Strong leadership helps society run efficiently.
8values.q13: Traditional values are an important foundation for social stability.
8values.q14: Society should actively embrace new lifestyles and ideas.
8values.q15: Religion and custom still have significant meaning in modern society.
8values.q16: Technological progress and social change should be accelerated.

authleft.title: Authoritarian Left
authleft.desc: You support strong state intervention to achieve economic equality and social fairness. In your view, collective interests outweigh individual freedom, and planning and order are keys to progress.

authright.title: Authoritarian Right
authright.desc: You value tradition, order, and national authority, believing free markets and state power can coexist. You tend to uphold existing values while supporting strong governance.

libleft.title: Libertarian Left
libleft.desc: You seek a combination of personal freedom and social equality, opposing oppressive authority structures. Your ideal is a diverse, inclusive, and mutual-aid society.

libright.title: Libertarian Right
libright.desc: You champion individual freedom, private property, and free markets, believing the least government is the best government. You trust competition and innovation to bring prosperity.
